name: Orange Apricorn
description: A Regional hard shelled fruit used by many to craft Pokeballs.

name: Brown Apricorn
description: A Regional hard shelled fruit used by many to craft Pokeballs.

name: Purple Apricorn
description: A Regional hard shelled fruit used by many to craft Pokeballs.

name: Silver Apricorn
description: A Regional hard shelled fruit used by many to craft Pokeballs.

name: Gold Apricorn
description: A Regional hard shelled fruit used by many to craft Pokeballs.

name: Master Apricorn
description: A Regional hard shelled fruit used by many to craft Pokeballs.

name: Soiled Apricorn
description: An Apricorn that's had its insides eaten.

name: Caster Fern
description: A fern used for crafting items made to be thrown. When these curled leaves are unfurled, they can serve as nature's wrapping paper.

name: Medicinal Leek
description: Required for crafting medicinal compounds. This plant is found growing across many regions.

name: Bugwort
description: A wildflower that has medicinal properties, but it is so bitter that no wild Pokemon will eat it.

name: Pep-Up Plant
description: A wildflower that has invigorating properties.

name: King's Leaf
description: The king of herbs, glittering and brilliant. Combining this herb with other materials needed to make medicines will boost their efficacy.

name: Vivichoke
description: Also called a morning-dew bud. It is used as a material for crafting items that can restore vitality to a Pokemon that has fainted.

name: Swordcap
description: A mushroom with strength boosting qualities.

name: Doppel Bonnet
description: A mushroom with agility boosting qualities.

name: Direshroom
description: A mushroom with focus boosting qualities.

name: Iron Barktongue
description: A mushroom with endurance boosting qualities.

name: Hearty Grains
description: Beautiful stalks of wheat bursting with life.

name: Sootfoot Root
description: A tuber used in cooking, it can also be dried and ground to produce a fine powder.

name: Plant Fibre
description: A winding slender stem found on rock walls.

name: Silk
description: A fine, strong, soft lustrous fibre.

name: Mareep Wool
description: An insulating hair-like fibre, that came from a Mareep.

name: Flaafy Wool
description: An insulating hair-like fibre, that came from a Flaafy.

name: Sweet Slime
description: A sticky gel-like substance with a pungent aroma attractive to Pokemon.

name: Milk
description: A white fluid secreted from the glands of domesticated cattle Pokemon.

name: Mushrooms
description: A stem, fleshy rounded cap, and gills underneath the cap.

name: Egg
description: A hard-shelled item, containing nutritive fluids.

name: Honey
description: A sweet fluid produced by specific Bug-types made using the nectar of flowering plants.

name: Red Paint
description: A viscous liquid made of dried Apricorn powders and Smeargle secretions.

description: A viscous liquid made of dried Apricorn powders and Smeargle secretions.

name: Glass

name: Glass Vial
description: A small glass vial, used for storing liquids.

name: Poison Vial
description: A small throwable vial that is used to inflict Poison.

name: Stun Vial
description: A small throwable vial that is used to inflict Paralysis.

name: Sleep Vial
description: A small throwable vial that is used to inflict Sleep.

name: Freeze Vial
description: A small throwable vial that is used to inflict Freeze.

name: Frost Shard
description: A cold shard, filled with Ice-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Ember Shard
description: A red shard, filled with Fire-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Aqua Shard
description: A blue shard, filled with Water-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Zap Shard
description: A sparking shard, filled with Electric-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Carapace Shard
description: A shell-like shard, filled with Bug-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Sky Shard
description: A light blue shard, filled with the Flying-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Dread Shard
description: A dark shard, filled with Dark-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Draco Shard
description: A rough shard, filled with Dragon-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Mind Shard
description: A whsipering shard, filled with Pyshcic-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Toxic Shard
description: A poisonous shard, filled with Poison-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Stone Shard
description: A hard shard, filled with Rock-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Earth Shard
description: An earthy shard, filled with Ground-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Leaf Shard
description: A green shard, filled with Grass-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Power Shard
description: A focused shard, filled with Fighting-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Blank Shard
description: A shard filled with Normal-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Spirit Shard
description: An ethereal shard, filled with Ghost-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Solid Shard
description: A refined material shard, filled with Steel-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: Pixie Shard
description: A joyful shard, filled with Fairy-type aura. Who knows what secrets it holds?

name: PokePoppet
description: A simple doll that somewhat looks like a Pokemon. Raises a small amount of friendship.

name: Stun Battery v1
description: A small copper cell used to power the Stun Baton. Provides 2 Charges.

name: Stun Battery v2
description: A silver cell used to power the Stun Baton. Provides 3 Charges.

name: Stun Battery v3
description: An adamantium cell used to power the Stun Baton. Provides 5 Charges.

name: Hiking Boots
description: Leather boots that keep you light on your feet, allowing you to traverse rough terrain easier.

name: Jump Boots
description: Tight fitting galoshes that allow normal movement through thick mud and other viscous terrains.

name: Rubber Boots
description: Tight fitting galoshes that allow normal movement through thick mud and other viscous terrains.

name: Lantern
description: Used for lighting up dark places.

name: Raft
description: Sturdy! Might be useful for crossing fresh water.

name: Remedy
description: A bitter remedy that heals 30HP, but slightly lowers friendship.

name: Fine Remedy
description: A bitter remedy that heals 50HP, but slightly lowers friendship.

name: Superb Remedy
description: A bitter remedy that heals 75HP, but slightly lowers friendship.

name: Tonic
description: A topical medicine meant to be applied to Pokemon. It can be used to restore 60 HP to a single Pokemon.

name: Super Tonic
description: A topical medicine meant to be applied to Pokemon. It can be used to restore 100 HP to a single Pokemon.

name: Hyper Tonic
description: A topical medicine meant to be applied to Pokemon. It can be used to restore 150 HP to a single Pokemon.

name: Max Tonic
description: A topical medicine meant to be applied to Pokemon. It can be used to completely restore the max HP of a single Pokemon.

name: Restore Tonic
description: A topical medicine meant to be applied to Pokemon. It can be used to fully restore the max HP of a single Pokemon and cure any status conditions it has.

name: Healing Tincture
description: A topical medicine meant to be applied to Pokemon. It can be used to heal any status condition a Pokemon may have.

name: Pep-Up Powder
description: A coarse powder made of ground Pep-Up Plant. Restores 5PP to a single move.

name: Medical Salve
description: Medicinal Leeks crushed into a viscous paste. Heals 20HP, often used as a base for other medicines.

name: Pep-Up Ointment
description: A medicinal salve that fully restores a single moves PP.

name: Energy Ointment
description: A medicinal salve that fully restores a pokemons PP.

name: Pecha Ointment
description: A medicinal salve that heals 20HP and cures Poison Status.

name: Cheri Ointment
description: A medicinal salve that heals 20HP and cures Paralyze Status.

name: Rawst Ointment
description: A medicinal salve that heals 20HP and cures Burn Status.

name: Aspear Ointment
description: A medicinal salve that heals 20HP and cures Frostbite and Frozen Status.

name: Ice Pack
description: A small pouch of Ice used to cure Burn.

name: Heat Pack
description: A small pouch thats hot to the touch used to cure Frostbite and Frozen.

name: Freeze Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Ice-type Pokemon.

name: Flare Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Fire-type Pokemon.

name: Tidal Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Water-type Pokemon.

name: Bolt Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Electric-type Pokemon.

name: Swarm Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Bug-type Pokemon.

name: Wing Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Flying-type Pokemon.

name: Shade Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Dark-type Pokemon.

name: Scale Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Dragon-type Pokemon.

name: Mystic Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Psychic-type Pokemon.

name: Venom Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Poison-type Pokemon.

name: Stone Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Rock-type Pokemon.

name: Earth Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Ground-type Pokemon.

name: Garden Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Grass-type Pokemon.

name: Power Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Fighting-type Pokemon.

name: Blank Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Normal-type Pokemon.

name: Grave Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Ghost-type Pokemon.

name: Ferro Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Steel-type Pokemon.

name: Pixie Ball
description: A unique type of PokeBall. Being more likely to succeed against Fairy-type Pokemon.

name: Dressed Lure
description: Fishing tackle wrapped in silk. Increases bite-rate.

name: Trap Lure
description: Fishing tackle that slows a Pokemons escape when not reeling.

name: Finder's Lure
description: Fishing tackle that raises the chances of pulling items up.

name: Magnet Lure
description: Fishing tackle that raises the chances of fishing up trash.

name: Barbed Hook
description: Fishing tackle that makes the 'fishing bar' cling to low level Pokemon.

name: Spicy Bait
description: A wrapped crushed berry. Increases bite rate of Pokemon that enjoy spicy things.

name: Dry Bait
description: A wrapped crushed berry. Increases bite rate of Pokemon that enjoy dry things.

name: Bitter Bait
description: A wrapped crushed berry. Increases bite rate of Pokemon that enjoy bitter things.

name: Sweet Bait
description: A wrapped crushed berry. Increases bite rate of Pokemon that enjoy sweet things.

name: Sour Bait
description: A wrapped crushed berry. Increases bite rate of Pokemon that enjoy sour things.

name: Hearty Bait
description: A thick portion large enough for multiple Pokemon. Increases the chance of a double catch.
